calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Heidilyn Depper, Defendant/Judgement Debtor in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Heidilyn Depper.

The claim of exemption is granted under CCP 704.080. Defendant's funds appear to be State exempt. Levying officer is to return $7,704.72 and any other held sums to debtor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
